title: pelargonium maximum
intro: Pelargonium maximum, also known as Geranium maximum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium maximum include its use in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium maximum can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
